pointers.title: The Puppet and the Sheet
pointers.blurb: The first one. An observer unravelling into its own background.

pointers.title: The Mirror Eye
pointers.blurb: Try to picture an eye seeing itself. Catch the cheat.

pointers.title: The Chair Before the Word
pointers.blurb: The gap where a shape is known before the label lands.

pointers.title: The Play-Doh Man
pointers.blurb: Chop the body and look for the piece the mind calls me.

pointers.title: The Letter
pointers.blurb: Look for the chooser in the act of choosing.

pointers.title: The Rope Climber
pointers.blurb: A climber made of the rope he climbs.
